testcase.name: test_manual_order_creation_with_currency
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter119_fx_currency_refactor.py:142: in test_manual_order_creation_with_currency assert res.status_code not in [422, 500], f"Manual order failed: {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Manual order failed: 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_email"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"customer_id":null,"product_id":"prod_zoho_one_express","subtotal":100.0,"discount":0.0,"fee":0.0,"currency":"EUR","status":"paid","internal_note":"TEST_FX_RATE_ORDER - automated test"}}]} E assert 422 not in [422, 500] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_manual_subscription_creation_with_currency
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter119_fx_currency_refactor.py:176: in test_manual_subscription_creation_with_currency assert res.status_code not in [422, 500], f"Manual sub failed: {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Manual sub failed: 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_email"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"customer_id":null,"product_id":"prod_zoho_one_express","amount":50.0,"currency":"GBP","renewal_date":"2027-01-01","internal_note":"TEST_FX_RATE_SUB - automated test"}}]} E assert 422 not in [422, 500] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
